new drop

anime drop ✦

hand-beaded acrylic charm keychains featuring characters from your favourite series — each one strung with tiny glass beads, flower charms, and little bows. no two are exactly alike~

charm

jellyfish phone charm ✦

a dreamy red jellyfish charm strung with ruby teardrops, a star bead, and an iridescent heart — catches the light beautifully and dangles from any phone strap or bag~

keychain

mofusand soda keychain ✦

the iconic mofusand cat chilling in a soda glass — paired with a pixel heart charm and a translucent bow on a green bead chain. the definition of serotonin~

kpop

a clear zippered photocard sleeve on a blue bead chain, decorated with pastel stars and confetti. fits standard photocards perfectly — keep your faves close~

✦ our story ✦

a tiny shop born from a love of all things cute, small, and carefully chosen. every trinket here is something i'd pick up for myself — which means you can trust it's special.

based in india, shipping love across the country. each order is packed by hand with a little note ♡
